props.name: items
props.description: An array of objects containing: link, text, image.

props.name: speed
props.description: Duration of the marquee animation in seconds (lower = faster).

props.name: textColor
props.description: Color of the static menu text.

props.name: bgColor
props.description: Background color of the menu container.

props.name: marqueeBgColor
props.description: Background color of the marquee overlay.

props.name: borderColor
props.description: Color of the dividing lines between menu items.
